zh.lifeSummary: 當Elisabeth von Mecklenburg於1231年出生在德國梅可倫波格時，她的父親Johann  I der Theologe von Mecklenburg29歲，母親Luitgard of Henneberg20歲。她於大約1250年與Gerhard I von Holstein-Itzehoe結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1280年2月6日享年49歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elisabeth von Mecklenburg于1231年出生在德国梅可倫波格时，她的父亲Johann  I der Theologe von Mecklenburg29岁，母亲Luitgard of Henneberg20岁。她于大约1250年与Gerhard I von Holstein-Itzehoe结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1280年2月6日享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Mecklenburg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from the province of this name in northern Germany, so called from Old Saxon mikil ‘big, great’ + burg ‘castle’. Amongst Jews this may have been acquired alternatively as an artificial name.

variants.name: Mekelburg
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Gerhard, Helmut.
German: variant of Meckelburg, itself a variant of Mecklenburg .

nameMeanings.name: Elisabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

variants.name: Elizabeth
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Elisabeth von Mecklenburg was born in 1231, in Mecklenburg, Germany, her father, Johann  I der Theologe von Mecklenburg, was 29 and her mother, Luitgard of Henneberg, was 20. She married Gerhard I von Holstein-Itzehoe about 1250. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 6 February 1280, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elisabeth von Mecklenburg est née en 1231, à Mecklenburg, Allemagne, son père, Johann  I der Theologe von Mecklenburg, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Luitgard of Henneberg, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Gerhard I von Holstein-Itzehoe environ 1250. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 6 février 1280, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elisabeth von Mecklenburg 1231 in Mecklenburg, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Johann  I der Theologe von Mecklenburg 29 und ihre Mutter Luitgard of Henneberg 20. Sie hat um 1250 Gerhard I von Holstein-Itzehoe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 6. Februar 1280 im Alter von 49 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elisabeth von Mecklenburg è nata il nel 1231 nel Mecklenburg, Germania, sua padre, Johann  I der Theologe von Mecklenburg, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Luitgard of Henneberg, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Gerhard I von Holstein-Itzehoe circa 1250. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 6 febbraio 1280, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elisabeth von Mecklenburgが1231年にドイツメックレンブルグで生まれた時，父Johann  I der Theologe von Mecklenburgは29歳，母Luitgard of Hennebergは20歳であった。約1250年にGerhard I von Holstein-Itzehoeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1280年2月6日に49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elisabeth von Mecklenburg(이)가 1231년 독일 클렌버그에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Johann  I der Theologe von Mecklenburg(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Luitgard of Henneberg(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 대략 1250년 Gerhard I von Holstein-Itzehoe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1280년 2월 6일 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elisabeth von Mecklenburg nasceu em 1231, em Mecklenburg, Alemanha, seu pai, Johann  I der Theologe von Mecklenburg, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Luitgard of Henneberg, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Gerhard I von Holstein-Itzehoe aproximadamente 1250. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 6 de fevereiro de 1280, com 49 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elisabeth von Mecklenburg родилась в 1231 г. в местности меккленбург, Германия, её отцу по имени Johann  I der Theologe von Mecklenburg было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Luitgard of Henneberg, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gerhard I von Holstein-Itzehoe около 1250 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 6 февраля 1280 г. в возрасте 49 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elisabeth von Mecklenburg nació en 1231, en Mecklenburg, Alemania, su papá, Johann  I der Theologe von Mecklenburg, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Luitgard of Henneberg, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Gerhard I von Holstein-Itzehoe aproximadamente 1250. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 6 de febrero de 1280, a la edad de 49 años.
